input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.2.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.2.1.2
            TITLE: the esf may provide guidance or more details than the formula sae rules.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.2.1.2: The ESF may provide guidance or more details than the Formula SAE Rules.
EV.2.1.2 The ESF may provide guidance or more details than the Formula SAE Rules.

final_answer: The ESF may provide guidance or more details than the Formula SAE Rules.
